name: Links
description: Pairs of jeweler’s rings interlocking across deep plum velvet — every redraw re-hangs the chain with new metals.

code.style: --metal1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --metal2: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color4)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 8%; top: @rand(20%, 30%); @size: 50%; border: calc(34px / @Y) solid var(--metal1); border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; transform: rotate(@rand(-12deg, 12deg)); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 42%; top: @rand(24%, 34%); @size: 50%; border: calc(34px / @Y) solid var(--metal2); border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; transform: rotate(@rand(-12deg, 12deg)); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
